canonical_question: Outsource vs in-house development - real cost comparison including hidden costs?
constraints: Rate data varies 20-40% by region and tech stack -- always localize estimates to your geography and required skills
Hidden cost percentages (15-25% contingency) are industry medians -- actual overruns depend on vendor maturity and contract structure
Comparison assumes a product company building software as a core activity -- service companies or agencies have different economics
Does not cover staff augmentation or embedded contractor models, which blend characteristics of both approaches
Regulatory constraints (data residency, ITAR, SOC 2) can eliminate outsourcing as an option regardless of cost advantage

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User is deciding between building custom software vs buying a SaaS product
User needs specific outsourcing hourly rates by country and tech stack
User is evaluating a specific outsourcing vendor or agency

inputs_needed.question: What type of software project is this?
options: Scaling an existing team for capacity

inputs_needed.question: How sensitive is the technology and data?
options: Low -- no regulated data, standard tech stack
Medium -- some proprietary logic, moderate compliance
High -- regulated data (healthcare, finance), core IP
